table.name: vtiger_servicetarget
table.sql: CREATE TABLE `vtiger_servicetarget` ( `servicetargetid` int(11) DEFAULT NULL, `target_no` varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL, `target_type` varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL, `value` varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL, `servicetarget_status` varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL, `start_date` date DEFAULT NULL, `end_date` date DEFAULT NULL ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8

table.name: vtiger_servicetargetcf
table.sql: CREATE TABLE `vtiger_servicetargetcf` ( `servicetargetid` int(11) NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (`servicetargetid`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8
